description:
Overview:
1. Exercise gloves full palm and wrist protection: care for your hands, no calluses and cracks. Fitness gloves can give you all-round protection. The wrist rest protects your arm from sprains. The foam pad on the palm is cushioned, unzips and non-slip effect. The wrist strap can be tightened or loosened, depending on your own comfort.
2. The back of the gloves is made of sweat-absorbent polyester and stretch fabrics, which improves breathability, flexibility and comfort. Reduce the sweat on your hands and keep them dry, so that you will not be affected by sweat during training. Let you have a better training experience.
3. High-quality and durable: exercise gloves are made of microfiber and wear-resistant materials. The high-quality materials are sweat-proof, latex-free, and have great physical toughness to provide cushioning and protection. Washable, durable, no need to worry about long-term exercise.

Specification:
Condition: 100% brand new-
Color: red, yellow, blue-
Size: M, L, XL-
Gender: men, women, unisex-
Sports: gym, weightlifting, fitness training-
Style: half finger, no finger-
Seasons: spring, summer and autumn-
Features: Weightlifting gloves with integrated wrist support provide the best grip for men and women-
Design: Superfine fiber stretch fabric semi-gloves, the adaptability of superfine fiber gloves, breathable stretch fabric will achieve a perfect balance between comfort and strength and durability during exercise.
Features: The wrist strap ensures free adjustment of tightness during exercise.
Occasion: Weightlifting cross training, gym, fitness, exercise, exercise

Size: M L XL
M: Palm Breite ≤8 cm, palm circumtance ≤20 cm.
L: Palm Breite 8-9 cm, palm circumtance 20-22 cm.
XL: palm breite 9-10 cm, palm circumtance 22-24 cm

Packing list:
Gloves*1 pair
